note: Watchlist channel scan. Channel-videos endpoint returns title metadata only (no separate videoTags field), so all candidates are extracted from in-title hashtags + title tokenization. All 19 channels resolved and pulled successfully (~95 credits). 6 handle resolutions discovered — fold these channelIds back into channels.json so next run skips resolution.

channels.warning: Handle @rotlia resolved to a channel currently titled 'Celestia' — possible rename. Verify before persisting.

exampleTitles: I'm a mech I'm a mech I'm a mech | #lancer #vtuber #ttrpg
candidates.rationale: Lancer (mech TTRPG by Massif Press) — dominant tag for AroWrites with 15+ videos. Pairs naturally with existing dnd/ttrpg tags. Strong TTRPG-niche signal.

exampleTitles: How I Rig Pixel Art Vtuber Mouthes #shorts #vtuber #live2d
Pixel Art Tip That Helped Me Develop a New Style
Animated Pixel Art Vtuber models are SO UNIQUE! #live2D
Crazy NG Pixel Art Vtuber Showcase❤️ #pixelart #vtuber #live2D #blubbrmuffins
candidates.rationale: Pixel art VTuber model niche — BlubbrMuffins has ~12 videos with this exact hashtag. Pairs with existing live2d/vtubermodel vocabulary. Likely under 'content' as a craft tag or in vtuber sub-section.

exampleTitles: Wifelotl has a few things to say… #memes #axolotl #foryou #foryoupage
candidates.rationale: Axolotl-themed creator identity — strong tag for Axoltism (axolotl VTuber). General-discoverability term (axolotl is a popular meme animal). Sits well under vtuber.small as 'axolotlvtuber' OR genres.

exampleTitles: Streamer beats Rykard from Elden Ring with only her VOICE!
Vtuber Beats Elden Ring's Consort Radahn With Voice Commands ORIGINAL
Streamer beats Malenia with voice commands!
Using VOICE ONLY to beat Rellana! (Elden Ring DLC)
Streamer Completes Only Up With Voice Commands ORIGINAL
candidates.rationale: Voice-commands gameplay (Larxa's signature challenge format — beating bosses via voice control). Not currently in pool. Could pair well with existing 'challenge' category. Title bigram, not hashtag — but appears in 8+ titles.

exampleTitles: We all have that ONE player… #comedy #dungeonsanddragons #dndskit #funny #dnd
candidates.rationale: Niche-specific hashtag combining DnD + skit — natural extension of existing dnd tag pool. Worth adding to dnd.tags or to content.skit as 'dndskit'.

exampleTitles: K.I.A Zomb*tch but with a perfectly cut scream #garlicbreadgoblin
candidates.rationale: Creator/series-specific tag for Axoltism. Niche but recurs heavily within their content.

candidates.rationale: Creator-specific tag (Axoltism collab/series identity). Low utility unless analyzer wants creator-network signals.

candidates.rationale: OC/series tag for AdarableKitten (dreamy storytime format). Channel-specific but recurring. Probably skip unless tracking creator-specific brands.

candidates.rationale: TikTok For-You-Page hashtag variant. Existing pool has 'fyp', 'foryou', 'foryoupage' — 'fypage' is a common variant worth adding to platform.tiktok.

exampleTitles: Be careful in the comments everyone! #warhammer40k #warhammer40000 #warhammervtuber #40kvtuber
Based on a true story. How did you discover Warhammer? #warhammervtuber #40kvtuber #warhammer40k
candidates.rationale: Below the 4-video threshold but worth flagging — warhammer-themed VTuber identity tag. Eggie added Aurelia specifically to grow this vocabulary. Pairs with existing warhammer game-tag family.

exampleTitles: HYTALE IS SO BACK! - Pre-orders today! #shorts
candidates.rationale: Below threshold but emerging. Hytale (Hypixel's Minecraft-adjacent sandbox) is a viable new game entry. FayeTale is leaning into the launch — likely to grow.

exampleTitles: My most viral video on TikTok #genz #avatarthelastairbender #funny #meme #memes #comedy
candidates.rationale: Below threshold but a meaningful fandom tag. Worth tracking — pairs well with existing anime/spongebob-style fandom entries.

channelHandleResolutions.warning: Possible channel rename — verify before persisting

methodologyNotes: vidiq_channel_videos returns title + thumbnail only (no videoTags field), so all candidate extraction is from in-title hashtags + title token n-grams.

Existing tags.json filtering applied (case-insensitive): generic noise tags (vtuber, shorts, viral, youtube, gaming, funny, comedy, memes, foryou, foryoupage, clips, anime, etc.) were excluded as they're already in the pool.

Threshold per task spec: appears in 2+ videos across 2+ channels, OR 4+ videos in a single channel. Three sub-threshold candidates included (warhammervtuber, hytale, avatarthelastairbender) as 'watch list' since they map to meaningful emerging niches.

Cross-channel signal was weak this run — most cross-channel hashtags (vtuber, vtuberclips, envtuber, peak, repo, partyanimals, backrooms, comicdub, voiceover) are already in tags.json. The novel additions are within-channel concentrated topic tags.
